sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19469" key="barupnei/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰρυ-πνείων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <sense id="n19469.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blowing fiercely,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀῆται</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:216" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">216</biblScope></bibl></cit>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:309" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">309</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
